caption: Hey — picking up Thai from Phuket on the way home. Kyle still coming Friday for the 4th? Need headcount before I call the marina.
Yes he's confirmed. Emily might bring her roommate though, checking now.
Fine. Just tell her to confirm by tomorrow — not counting mystery guests for the boat.
Done. Also your mom called, wants to know if we're coming Sunday.
Sunday lunch yes, not dinner. I need to prep Monday — Ravi and I have a complicated TAVR consult first thing.
She'll be happy with lunch. Noon?
Noon works. Remind me to bring sunscreen this time. Last 4th nearly cooked me.
You're a cardiologist who forgets SPF. Truly inspiring. It's already in the bag.
Pulled the swell forecast — looks workable.
Cetirizine taken — vog spike incoming.
Walls or Queens depending on wind shift.
Confirmed for the morning slot.
Confirmed for the morning slot.
Walls or Queens depending on wind shift.
Cetirizine taken — vog spike incoming.
Sunday meal prep done.
Lab standup pushed to 9:15.
Phase III transect logged; sending raw counts.
Phase III transect logged; sending raw counts.
Sunday meal prep done.
5:15 AM run along the St. Johns River. Three miles, sun coming up over the water. [Apr 02, 2026]
Saturday brisket on the smoker since dawn. Post oak, 225, patience. [Apr 03, 2026]
Chopin nocturne before clinic. Twenty minutes at the Yamaha resets everything. [Apr 04, 2026]
